The reviewer criticized the dialogue as sounding like it comes from an old movie (this doesn't match option B, which claims the dialogue is original and creative). 4. The passage mentions the attack scenes are 40 minutes long and come late in the movie, but it doesn't state that the reviewer thought the attack scenes occupied too much time.
